name: raven-codex
description: Enterprise AI coding discipline for OpenAI Codex. CVE scanning, secret detection, PR gate enforcement, encrypted audit logs.
shortDescription: Enterprise security discipline — CVE scan, secret detection, PR gates, audit logs.
longDescription: Raven enforces enterprise-grade coding discipline on every Codex task. Before any code reaches a PR it runs: CVE scanning on all imported libraries, secret detection across changed files, manifest validation against your declared stack, and writes an encrypted audit log of every action taken. Raven posts a visible status on every PR — ✅ cleared, 🔴 blocked, or ⚠️ did not run — so nothing slips through unreviewed. Part of the Raven platform, which runs the same enforcement layer on Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and GitHub CI — making discipline platform-agnostic.
defaultPrompt: Run raven_status to confirm Raven is active on this project.
